text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: "There will never be a deal unless they agree that they won't have nuclear weapons." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049563931652321456/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普谈伊朗：“除非他们同意不再拥有核武器，否则永远不会达成协议。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049563931652321456/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Following his call today with Russia’s Vladimir Putin, U.S. President Donald J. Trump states that the both the war with Iran and Ukraine may be on “similar timetables” for when they could end, before appearing to misspeak and claim that Ukraine is “militarily defeated” while clearly speaking about Iran. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今天与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京通话后，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，伊朗战争和乌克兰战争的结束时间可能处于“相似的时间表”上，随后他似乎口误，在明显谈论伊朗时声称乌克兰已被“军事击败”。推文

text: WarMonitor Pete Hegseth dodges questions about the cost of the Iran war, even as the Pentagon estimates it’s already at least $25 billion. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049563200002142386/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 皮特·赫格塞斯回避了关于伊朗战争成本的问题，尽管五角大楼估计其成本至少已达 250 亿美元。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049563200002142386/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇦 US President Donald Trump: "Ukraine is militarily defeated. You won't understand this if you read 'fake news.' They had 159 ships — now each one of them is underwater. Usually, this is considered quite 'good.' All their planes have been shot down or destroyed (likely Iran is interfering)." Trump states that Putin is ready for a temporary ceasefire, which may be announced soon. According to him, Putin wanted to end the war earlier, but some people complicated reaching an agreement. Trump notes that the Russia-Ukraine and Iran wars may end around the same time. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇦 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“乌克兰在军事上已被击败。如果你读‘假新闻’，你就不会明白这一点。他们曾有 159 艘船——现在每一艘都沉在水底。通常，这被认为相当‘不错’。他们所有的飞机都被击落或摧毁了（很可能是伊朗在干预）。”特朗普表示，普京已准备好进行临时停火，这可能会很快宣布。据他所说，普京本想早点结束战争，但有些人使达成协议变得复杂。特朗普指出，俄乌战争和伊朗战争可能会在同一时间左右结束。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: "They have to cry uncle just say, 'We give up.'" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049562175560155196/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普谈伊朗：“他们必须认输，只要说‘我们投降’就行。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049562175560155196/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) US President Trump following his phone call with Russian President Putin: "I talked about a few different subjects, mostly about Ukraine, and we had a very good conversation. I think we're going to come up with a solution relatively quickly, I hope. I think he'd like to see a solution, I can tell you, and that's good." tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 美国总统特朗普在与俄罗斯总统普京通电话后表示：“我谈到了几个不同的主题，主要是关于乌克兰的，我们进行了一次非常好的谈话。我认为我们很快就会拿出一个解决方案，我希望如此。我想他愿意看到一个解决方案，我可以告诉你，这很好。”推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump says that Iran has roughly 20% of its missile production facilities remaining. “The rest could [be destroyed] very quickly if we don’t make a deal.” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049561753793511814/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普称伊朗大约还剩下 20% 的导弹生产设施。“如果我们不达成协议，其余的很快就会[被摧毁]。” https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2049561753793511814/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth and Rep. Moulton exchanged words on if the U.S. is winning the conflict with Iran. Rep. Moulton: "Listen. How is this war going? Do you think we're winning?" Hegseth: "Militarily on the battlefield, it's been an astounding…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 U.S. Rep. Moulton questions Secretary of War Hegseth on how much Iran has profited from the Trump administration waving sanctions, and their ability to purchase Chinese weapons systems using those profits. Rep. Moulton: "How much has Iran profited from your administration lifting the sanctions on Iran when you started this war?" Hegseth: "I can tell you Iran is financially devastated right now." Rep. Moulton: "Okay. Well, they've heard about 14,000,000,000..." Hegseth: "They're they're at a point where between the blockade and what we've done to them militarily remember, they don't have a navy. They can't contest the blockade. Between what we've done to the military and the national, they're at a place billion dollars. They have very few options. How many Chinese missiles can they buy for $14,000,000,000? Does that sound like winning? Hegseth: "They're not we're we're ensuring and they're not buying Chinese missiles." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国战争部长赫格塞斯与众议员莫尔顿就美国是否正在赢得对伊朗的冲突交换了意见。莫尔顿众议员：“听着。这场战争进展如何？你认为我们赢了吗？”赫格塞斯：“在战场上，这令人震惊……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 美国众议员莫尔顿质问战争部长赫格塞斯，伊朗从特朗普政府取消制裁中获利多少，以及他们利用这些利润购买中国武器系统的能力。莫尔顿众议员：“当你开始这场战争时，伊朗从你们政府取消对伊朗的制裁中获利了多少？”赫格塞斯：“我可以告诉你，伊朗现在在经济上已经崩溃了。”莫尔顿众议员：“好吧。嗯，他们听说大约有 140 亿美元……”赫格塞斯：“他们现在处于一种地步，在封锁和我们在军事上对他们所做的事情之间，记住，他们没有海军。他们无法对抗封锁。在我们在军事和国家方面所做的事情之间，他们处于一个 140 亿美元的地方。他们几乎没有选择。他们能用 140 亿美元买多少中国导弹？这听起来像赢了吗？”赫格塞斯：“他们没有……我们正在确保他们没有购买中国导弹。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Trump says he's "very disappointed" NATO "just wasn't there" when called on regarding Iran. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普表示，他对北约在伊朗问题上被要求时“根本没到场”感到“非常失望”。推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking moment ago in the Oval Office, President Trump stated that he had a “very good conversation” today with Russian President Vladimir Putin about both Iran and Ukraine, with Putin claimed to have expressed interest in helping with Iran’s stockpile of highly-enriched uranium, to which Trump respond: “I’d much rather have you involved with ending the war with Ukraine.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 不久前在椭圆形办公室发表讲话时，特朗普总统表示，他今天与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京就伊朗和乌克兰问题进行了“非常好的谈话”，普京据称表示有兴趣帮助处理伊朗的高浓缩铀库存，对此特朗普回应道：“我宁愿你参与结束乌克兰战争。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: If it was up to King Charles, he would have probably helped us with Iran. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049559698332856607/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：如果是查尔斯国王说了算，他可能已经帮我们对付伊朗了。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049559698332856607/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the U.S. Department of State, U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper during King Charles III’s visit to the U.S. to discuss a number of issues, including “restoring freedom of navigation to the Strait of Hormuz.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国国务院发布的消息，美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥在查尔斯三世国王访问美国期间会见了英国外交大臣伊薇特·库珀，讨论了包括“恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由”在内的多个议题。推文

text: WarTranslated Video of two Russian helicopters, a Mi-28 and a Mi-17, being struck by Unmanned Systems Forces drones in the Voronezh region. At the time of the strike, a maintenance specialist was on board one of the helicopters. He was also eliminated. /2150182473/1859 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049559486101061643/video/1 Very interesting hints from the Unmanned Systems Forces. We are waiting for further details. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049472269970239828/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 两架俄罗斯直升机（一架 Mi-28 和一架 Mi-17）在沃罗涅日地区被无人系统部队的无人机击中的视频。袭击发生时，一名维修专家在其中一架直升机上。他也已被消灭。/2150182473/1859 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049559486101061643/video/1 来自无人系统部队的非常有趣的暗示。我们正在等待进一步的细节。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2049472269970239828/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：乌克兰，在军事上，他们被击败了。读假新闻你不会知道这一点。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049558811208302773/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says all Iran has to do is "...cry uncle. That's all they have to do. Just say 'we give up!'" https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049557876918681820/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 特朗普说伊朗所要做的就是“……认输。他们只需要做这些。只要说‘我们投降！’” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049557876918681820/video/1 推文

text: ELINT News One wonders how they are holding back the Russian army then. When the Russians reach Kyiv (or even Kramatorsk) wake me up After talking with President Putin, Trump says that Ukraine's military is "militarily defeated" - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 人们不禁想知道他们是如何抵挡住俄罗斯军队的。当俄罗斯人到达基辅（甚至克拉马托尔斯克）时叫醒我。在与普京总统交谈后，特朗普说乌克兰军队“在军事上被击败了” - Faytuks News 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says "it's great" the UAE pulled out of OPEC. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049556959385272579/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 现在 - 特朗普说阿联酋退出欧佩克“太棒了”。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2049556959385272579/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇦🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the UAE leaving OPEC is a great thing. Reporter: "The United Arab Emirates, the UAE, they pulled out of OPEC. What do you think about that?" Trump: "I think it's great. I mean, I think it's great. Look, I…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇻🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the blockade was foolproof, reiterating Iran's military defeat and boasting about the U.S. military operation in Venezuela. Reporter: "President, regarding Iran, how long are you prepared to maintain the blockade? Could that go several more months?" Trump: "Well, the blockade is genius, OK? The blockade has been 100% foolproof. It shows how good our Navy is, I can tell you that. Nobody's going to play games. We have the greatest military in the world, and I built much of it during my first term, and we've been building it since. And the greatest anywhere in the world, nobody even close. And you see that, whether it's Venezuela, which — and they have a good military in Venezuela, but it was over in one day. It was actually over in about 48 minutes. Iran, the same thing. I mean, militarily, we've wiped them out. They have no military left. Their — it's all — the Navy is at the bottom of the sea. The Air Force is never going to fly again. We've got an amazing military. Now we — now they have to cry uncle. That's all they have to do is just say, we give up, we give up. But their economy is really in trouble. It's a — it's a dead economy." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇦🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，阿联酋退出欧佩克是一件好事。记者：“阿拉伯联合酋长国，阿联酋，他们退出了欧佩克。你对此有何看法？”特朗普：“我认为这太棒了。我是说，我认为这太棒了。看，我……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇻🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，封锁是万无一失的，重申了伊朗的军事失败，并吹嘘了美国在委内瑞拉的军事行动。记者：“总统先生，关于伊朗，你准备维持封锁多久？这可能会持续几个月吗？”特朗普：“嗯，封锁是天才之举，好吗？封锁是 100% 万无一失的。这表明我们的海军有多棒，我可以告诉你。没人会玩花样。我们拥有世界上最伟大的军队，我在第一个任期内建立了其中的大部分，而且我们一直在建设它。它是世界上最伟大的，没有人能比得上。你看到了，无论是委内瑞拉——他们在委内瑞拉有一支不错的军队，但一天之内就结束了。实际上大约 48 分钟就结束了。伊朗也是一样。我是说，在军事上，我们已经消灭了他们。他们没有军队了。他们的——这一切——海军在海底。空军永远不会再飞了。我们拥有一支了不起的军队。现在我们——现在他们必须认输。他们只需要说，我们投降，我们投降。但他们的经济确实陷入了困境。这是一个——这是一个死掉的经济。” @wfwitness

text: Fed's Powell: Energy surge hasn’t even peaked yet.
text_zh: 美联储主席鲍威尔：能源激增甚至还没有达到顶峰。

text: Israel killed 3-year-old baby Mila Zayyat on her home in southern Lebanon, along with her mother.
text_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩南部杀害了 3 岁的米拉·扎亚特（Mila Zayyat）及其母亲。

text: Open Source Intel SIX IRANIAN CREW MEMBERS OF IRANIAN-FLAGGED CONTAINER SHIP TOUSKA FREED AFTER SEIZURE BY US, 22 IRANIANS STILL HELD - TASNIM NEWS AGENCY @DeItaone tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：悬挂伊朗国旗的集装箱船“Touska”号上的6名伊朗船员在被美国扣押后获释，仍有22名伊朗人被扣押——塔斯尼姆通讯社 @DeItaone 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺🇮🇷🇺🇦 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Ukraine is militarily defeated, mistaking it with Iran as he mentions the 159 vessal benchmark. Reporter: "On your call with President Putin today, do you think the war in Iran ends first or the war in…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇪 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the UAE leaving OPEC is a great thing. Reporter: "The United Arab Emirates, the UAE, they pulled out of OPEC. What do you think about that?" Trump: "I think it's great. I mean, I think it's great. Look, I know him very well, Mohammed, and very smart. And he probably maybe wants to go his own way. That's a good thing. I think, ultimately, it's a good thing for getting the price of gas down, getting oil down, getting everything down. They have it all. He's a great leader, actually, so no, I'm OK. They're having some problems in OPEC." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺🇮🇷🇺🇦 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普声称乌克兰在军事上已被击败，他在提到159艘船只的基准时将其与伊朗混淆。记者：‘在今天与普京总统的通话中，你认为伊朗战争会先结束，还是……战争会先结束？’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇪 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示阿联酋退出欧佩克是一件好事。记者：“阿拉伯联合酋长国，阿联酋，他们退出了欧佩克。你对此有何看法？”特朗普：“我认为这很棒。我是说，我认为这很棒。听着，我非常了解他，穆罕默德，他非常聪明。他可能想走自己的路。这是一件好事。我认为，归根结底，这对降低油价、降低石油价格、降低一切价格都是一件好事。他们拥有一切。事实上，他是一位伟大的领导人，所以不，我没问题。他们在欧佩克遇到了一些问题。” @wfwitness

text: NEW: Germany will embed a senior U.S. colonel inside its Army Command (Operations Division) starting October, an unusually deep level of military integration meant to strengthen NATO coordination and joint planning. Source: Politico
text_zh: 最新消息：德国将从10月起在其陆军司令部（作战部）内部署一名美国高级上校，这是一种不同寻常的深度军事整合，旨在加强北约的协调和联合规划。来源：Politico

text: Reporter: Do you really think James Comey was threatening your life? Trump: “86” is a mob term that means “kill them.”
text_zh: 记者：你真的认为詹姆斯·科米在威胁你的生命吗？特朗普：“86”是一个黑帮术语，意思是“干掉他们”。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth's response to Rep. Smith's question seeking clarification on the success of Operation Midnight Hammer. Hegseth: "Well, their nuclear facilities have been obliterated. Underground, they're buried and watching twenty four…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth and Rep. Moulton exchanged words on if the U.S. is winning the conflict with Iran. Rep. Moulton: "Listen. How is this war going? Do you think we're winning?" Hegseth: "Militarily on the battlefield, it's been an astounding military success." Rep. Moulton: "No. But are we winning the war?" Hegseth: "Absolutely." Rep. Moulton: "Okay. So do you call Iran closing the Strait Of Hormuz winning?" Hegseth: "Well, I would say the blockade that we hold that doesn't allow anything to come in or out of Iranian ports will always..." Rep. Moulton: "Ok, we've blockaded their blockades. They blockaded us, and then we blockaded their blockade. That's like saying tag, you're it. Or, you know, if if president Madison has said, well, the British just burned down Washington, but don't worry. We're gonna burn it down as well." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国战争部长赫格塞斯回应史密斯众议员关于寻求澄清‘午夜之锤’行动成功与否的问题。赫格塞斯：‘嗯，他们的核设施已经被摧毁了。在地下，它们被埋葬了，并且正在观察二十四……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长赫格塞斯与莫尔顿众议员就美国是否正在赢得与伊朗的冲突交换了意见。莫尔顿众议员：“听着。这场战争进展如何？你认为我们正在获胜吗？”赫格塞斯：“在战场上，这是一次惊人的军事成功。”莫尔顿众议员：“不。但我们正在赢得这场战争吗？”赫格塞斯：“绝对是。”莫尔顿众议员：“好吧。那么你称伊朗封锁霍尔木兹海峡为获胜吗？”赫格塞斯：“嗯，我会说我们实施的封锁不允许任何东西进出伊朗港口，这将永远……”莫尔顿众议员：“好吧，我们封锁了他们的封锁。他们封锁了我们，然后我们封锁了他们的封锁。这就像说‘抓人游戏，轮到你了’。或者，你知道，如果麦迪逊总统说，好吧，英国人刚刚烧毁了华盛顿，但别担心。我们也会把它烧毁。” @wfwitness

text: 📝 Успехи на широком фронте 📝 На Слобожанском направлении российские войска продолжают расширять зону контроля в приграничье Сумской области . На северном фланге штурмовые подразделения ГВ «Север» завершили освобождение Новодмитровки , расположенной в нескольких километрах к востоку от Краснополья . Само село лежит в низине относительно российских позиций, поэтому его удалось зачистить всего через несколько дней после освобождения соседнего Таратутино . Начались же бои за него несколько недель назад. ➡️ С учетом занятия территории расположенных рядом лесов Большой и Горьковский ВС РФ могут начинать подготовку к штурму соседней Михайловки , находящейся непосредственно в предместьях Краснополья . Оно является крупным транспортным хабом ВСУ на участке. Противник, вероятно, попытается перебросить резервы для усиления позиций в окрестностях поселка. ➡️ Контроль над Краснопольем позволит перерезать снабжение противника по трассе, ведущей на Большую Писаревку на юг, и в сторону Сум на северо-запад. Данное обстоятельство значительно осложнит логистику противника в окрестных лесополосах и населенных пунктах, поэтому следует ожидать роста интенсивности и ожесточенности столкновений на этом участке в ближайшее время. 📌 Успехи на Слобожанском направлении , в свою очередь, позволяют отвлечь внимание украинских формирований от соседних участков как приграничья, так и заставить перебросить подкрепления с других направлений. Это позволяет ВС РФ с меньшими усилиями продвигаться в том числе на соседнем Бурлукском направлении , где тоже идут интенсивные бои в приграничной зоне. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #Белгород #дайджест #карта #Россия #Сумы #Украина #Харьков ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 广泛战线上的成功 📝 在斯洛博然斯克方向，俄罗斯军队继续扩大苏梅州边境地区的控制区。在北翼，“北方”部队的突击分队完成了对位于克拉斯诺波利以东几公里的新德米特罗夫卡的解放。该村庄相对于俄罗斯阵地处于低地，因此在解放邻近的塔拉图蒂诺几天后就成功将其清理干净。对该村的战斗始于几周前。 ➡️ 考虑到占领了附近的大戈尔科夫斯基森林领土，俄罗斯武装部队可以开始准备突击邻近的米哈伊洛夫卡，该村直接位于克拉斯诺波利的郊区。它是乌克兰武装部队在该地区的一个大型交通枢纽。敌人可能会试图调动预备队以加强该定居点附近的阵地。 ➡️ 控制克拉斯诺波利将切断敌人沿通往南部大皮萨列夫卡和西北方向通往苏梅的公路的补给。这一情况将大大增加敌人周边林带和定居点的后勤难度，因此预计该地区冲突的强度和激烈程度将在近期增加。 📌 斯洛博然斯克方向的成功，反过来又使乌克兰部队的注意力从邻近的边境地区转移开，并迫使他们从其他方向调动增援部队。这使得俄罗斯武装部队能够以更小的努力推进，包括在邻近的布尔卢克方向，那里边境地区也在进行激烈的战斗。如果您有关于局势的补充，或者希望我们突出您部队的成功，您可以随时在反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 给我们写信 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版本 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #别尔哥罗德 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #苏梅 #乌克兰 #哈尔科夫 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump confirmed that he spoke with Russian President Vladimir Putin, he also confirmed that Russia asked to help the U.S. in the nuclear file with Iran. Reporter: You spoke to Vladimir Putin not too long ago. Did you talk…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇦 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Ukraine is militarily defeated, mistaking it with Iran as he mentions the 159 vessal benchmark. Reporter: "On your call with President Putin today, do you think the war in Iran ends first or the war in Ukraine?" Trump: "Well, we talked more about the war in Ukraine, but he would like to be of help. I said, 'Before you help me, I want to end your war.' So we had a good talk. I've known him a long time. I think he was ready to make a deal a while ago. I think some people made it difficult for him to make a deal, but we talked more about Ukraine. That's an interesting question, you know, coming from you, that's very interesting. Which war would end first? I don't know. Maybe they're on a similar timetable. I think Ukraine, militarily, they're defeated. Okay, you wouldn't know that by reading the fake news, but militarily, they're maybe so. They had 159 ships. Every ship is right now underwater. Typically, that's pretty good." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇷🇺🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普证实他与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京进行了交谈，他还证实俄罗斯要求在伊朗核问题上帮助美国。记者：你不久前与弗拉基米尔·普京进行了交谈。你谈到了……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇦 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普声称乌克兰在军事上已被击败，他在提到159艘船只的基准时将其与伊朗混淆。记者：“在今天与普京总统的通话中，你认为伊朗战争会先结束，还是乌克兰战争会先结束？”特朗普：“嗯，我们更多地谈论了乌克兰战争，但他愿意提供帮助。我说，‘在你帮助我之前，我想结束你的战争。’所以我们谈得很好。我认识他很久了。我认为他不久前就准备好达成协议了。我认为有些人让他难以达成协议，但我们更多地谈论了乌克兰。这是一个有趣的问题，你知道，从你那里提出来，这非常有趣。哪场战争会先结束？我不知道。也许它们的时间表差不多。我认为乌克兰在军事上已经被击败了。好吧，你读那些假新闻是不会知道这一点的，但在军事上，他们可能就是这样。他们有159艘船。现在每一艘船都在水下。通常情况下，这相当不错。” @wfwitness

text: Trump on Iran: They have come a long way; the question is whether or not they go far enough. At this moment, there will never be a deal unless they agree that they won’t have nuclear weapons.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：他们已经走了很长一段路；问题在于他们是否走得足够远。目前，除非他们同意不拥有核武器，否则永远不会达成协议。

text: 🇧🇭 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Bahrain Regime Revokes Citizenship of 69 Over Alleged Support for Iran Bahrain’s Interior Ministry announced on April 27 that it has stripped 69 individuals, including some family members, of their Bahraini citizenship. The regime accused them of “glorifying or sympathising with hostile Iranian acts” and maintaining contacts with external entities during the recent regional conflict. The regime stated that all affected individuals are of “non-Bahraini origin” and that the measure was taken under Article 10 of the Bahraini Nationality Law to protect national security. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇧🇭 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 巴林政权因涉嫌支持伊朗而撤销69人国籍。巴林内政部4月27日宣布，已剥夺69人（包括一些家庭成员）的巴林国籍。该政权指责他们“美化或同情敌对的伊朗行为”，并在最近的地区冲突期间与外部实体保持联系。该政权表示，所有受影响的人员均为“非巴林血统”，此举是根据《巴林国籍法》第10条为保护国家安全而采取的。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Trump on Iran: They have to cry uncle—just say, “We give up.”
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：他们必须认输——只要说，“我们投降。”

text: Reporter: The UAE pulled out of OPEC. What do you think about that? Trump: I think it’s great. Mohamed is very smart and he probably wants go his own way.
text_zh: 记者：阿联酋退出了欧佩克。你对此有何看法？特朗普：我认为这很棒。穆罕默德非常聪明，他可能想走自己的路。

text: Trump: If it was up to King Charles, he would have probably helped us with Iran.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果由查尔斯国王决定，他可能会在伊朗问题上帮助我们。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump confirmed that he spoke with Russian President Vladimir Putin, he also confirmed that Russia asked to help the U.S. in the nuclear file with Iran. Reporter: You spoke to Vladimir Putin not too long ago. Did you talk to him today? Did you talk to him about the progress in the space area? And what else? Trump: I didn't talk about space. No, I talked about Ukraine and I talked a little bit about Iran. I talked about a few different subjects, mostly about Ukraine, and we had a very good conversation. I think we're going to come up with a solution relatively quickly, I hope. What was he like? I think you'd like to see a solution. I can tell you, and that's good. Reporter: "What involvement does he want to have in the Iran situation?" Trump: "He told me he'd like to be involved in the enrichment if he can help us get it. I said, I'd much rather have you be involved with ending the war with Ukraine. To me, that would be more important because we're not going to let Iran have a nuclear weapon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普证实他与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京进行了交谈，他还证实俄罗斯提出在伊朗核问题上帮助美国。记者：您不久前与弗拉基米尔·普京通过话。您今天和他谈了吗？您和他谈论太空领域的进展了吗？还有其他什么？特朗普：我没有谈论太空。不，我谈到了乌克兰，也稍微谈到了伊朗。我谈到了几个不同的主题，主要是关于乌克兰，我们进行了一次非常好的谈话。我认为我们很快就会找到解决方案，我希望如此。他表现得怎么样？我想您会希望看到一个解决方案。我可以告诉您，这很好。记者：“他想在伊朗局势中扮演什么角色？”特朗普：“他告诉我，如果他能帮我们解决浓缩问题，他愿意参与其中。我说，我更希望你参与结束乌克兰战争。对我来说，那更重要，因为我们不会让伊朗拥有核武器。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Chant of the Iranian in Enghelab Square, Tehran: “The only Shah is the Shah of Najaf, not the dishonorable Pahlavi.” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 德黑兰英格拉布广场伊朗人的口号：“唯一的沙阿是纳杰夫的沙阿，而不是可耻的巴列维。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Trump: Ukraine, militarily, they’re defeated. You wouldn’t know that by reading the fake news.
text_zh: 特朗普：乌克兰在军事上已经战败了。读那些假新闻你可看不出来。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Rep. Pat Ryan (D-NY) revealed that Hegseth ordered U.S. military personnel to a location in Kuwait despite an active warning of no defense against drone attacks. Six service members were killed as a result, and survivors are blaming Hegseth. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 众议员帕特·瑞安（纽约州民主党人）透露，赫格塞斯下令美军人员前往科威特的一个地点，尽管当时有明确警告称该地点无法防御无人机袭击。结果导致六名军人丧生，幸存者指责赫格塞斯。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Trump on Iran: Their money—they call it their money; they don’t have a name for it. Their money is valueless.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：他们的钱——他们称之为他们的钱；他们甚至没有名字来称呼它。他们的钱毫无价值。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Department of War Comptroller Hurst estimates that Operation Epic Fury costed the government $25 billion so far. Rep. Smith: "Drag you into the conversation here. We have not yet received from the Pentagon the costs of the war. So just for the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth's response to Rep. Smith's question seeking clarification on the success of Operation Midnight Hammer. Hegseth: "Well, their nuclear facilities have been obliterated. Underground, they're buried and watching twenty four seven. So we know where any nuclear material is." Rep. Smith: "Reclaiming time for watching at second here. We had to start this war, you just said, sixty days ago, because the nuclear weapon was an imminent threat. Now you're saying that it was completely obliterated?" Hegseth: "They had not given up their nuclear ambitions, and they had a conventional shield of thousands of..." Rep. Smith: "Well, Operation Midnight Hammer accomplished nothing of substance. It left us at exactly the same place..." Hegseth: "You're missing the point" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国战争部审计长赫斯特估计，‘史诗之怒’行动迄今已耗资250亿美元。史密斯众议员：“把你拉进谈话中。我们尚未收到五角大楼关于战争成本的报告。所以仅仅为了……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长赫格塞斯对史密斯众议员询问‘午夜之锤’行动成功与否的回答。赫格塞斯：“嗯，他们的核设施已经被摧毁了。在地下，它们被掩埋并受到全天候监控。所以我们知道任何核材料在哪里。” 史密斯众议员：“收回时间，等一下。你刚才说，我们六十天前不得不发动这场战争，因为核武器是迫在眉睫的威胁。现在你说它已经被完全摧毁了？” 赫格塞斯：“他们没有放弃核野心，他们有一个由数千个……组成的常规盾牌。” 史密斯众议员：“嗯，‘午夜之锤’行动没有取得任何实质性成果。它让我们处于完全相同的位置……” 赫格塞斯：“你没抓住重点” @wfwitness

text: 🛢 📈 Amid Trump's threats to impose a long-term blockade on Iran, Brent oil has almost reached $120 per barrel. For reference: the current Russian budget was based on the price of $59 per barrel. According to Western estimates, even despite the strikes on Russian refineries, Russia will earn up to $40 billion from the consequences of the Epstein coalition's aggression against Iran if the conflict continues. In the event of a second round of military action, oil prices will start growing again. The US congressmen were unable to get an answer from Hegseth on how the blockade of Iranian ports will help open the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🛢 📈 在特朗普威胁要对伊朗实施长期封锁之际，布伦特原油价格已接近每桶120美元。参考：俄罗斯目前的预算是基于每桶59美元的价格制定的。据西方估计，尽管俄罗斯炼油厂遭到袭击，但如果冲突持续，俄罗斯将从爱泼斯坦联盟对伊朗的侵略后果中赚取高达400亿美元。如果发生第二轮军事行动，油价将再次开始上涨。美国国会议员未能从赫格塞斯那里得到关于封锁伊朗港口将如何有助于开放霍尔木兹海峡的答案。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: I think Putin was ready to make a deal a while ago; I think “some people” made it difficult for him to make a deal.
text_zh: 特朗普：我认为普京不久前就准备达成协议；我认为是“某些人”让他难以达成协议。

text: Trump: I suggested a little bit of a ceasefire to Putin; I think he might do that. Did he announce it yet?
text_zh: 特朗普：我向普京建议了一点停火；我认为他可能会这样做。他宣布了吗？
